# Electro-Oxidation

**Summary**: A process where organic contaminants are oxidized at the electrode surface via direct electron transfer or indirect production of radicals.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-al-aqeel|Al-Aqeel, 2023]] used electro-oxidation to treat spent caustic effluent from an ethylene plant.

## Key Results and Findings

- Under optimal conditions (pH 4, current density 150 mA/cm2), COD was reduced significantly in a 4-hour period. ([[2023-al-aqeel|Al-Aqeel, 2023, p. 14]])
